branches.basis: Observed with git branch --show-current during the hygiene installation audit.

branches.purpose: Build a narrow client-demo contour across demo personas, hierarchy, briefings, employee signing, permits, reports, handover, and director read-only visibility.
steps: Step 1 - Demo personas, hierarchy, seeded accounts
Step 3 - Narrow permit flow, work report, handover

last_session.worked_slice: STEP-2: closed briefing and journal persona behavior without new auth roles; Safety Engineer can operate org-wide non-primary briefings, Shop Chief can operate scoped primary workplace briefings, Director is read-only, and Employee remains self-service for own briefing records

last_session.next_action: Start Step 3 only: narrow permit flow, work report, and handover. Stop point is before any permit behavior in Step 2.
